content.text: I’ll locate the Gemini streaming response builder and related tests so I can reproduce and fix the candidate-null/empty handling.

content.text: I found the failing access in `GeminiStreamingResponseBuilder.append()` and the analogous Vertex AI guard. Next I’ll inspect the Google AI Gemini test structure and response model constructors so I can add a focused regression test.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <parent>
        <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
        <artifactId>langchain4j-parent</artifactId>
        <version>1.13.0-beta23-SNAPSHOT</version>
        <relativePath>../langchain4j-parent/pom.xml</relativePath>
    </parent>

    <artifactId>langchain4j-google-ai-gemini</artifactId>
    <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
    <name>LangChain4j :: Integration :: Google AI Gemini</name>

    <developers>
        <developer>
            <id>glaforge</id>
            <name>Guillaume Laforge</name>
            <url>https://github.com/glaforge</url>
        </developer>
    </developers>

    <properties>
        <maven.compiler.parameters>true</maven.compiler.parameters>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j-core</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j-http-client</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j-http-client-jdk</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-annotations</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-core</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- test dependencies -->

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j-core</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
            <classifier>tests</classifier>
            <type>test-jar</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j-http-client</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
            <classifier>tests</classifier>
            <type>test-jar</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
            <classifier>tests</classifier>
            <type>test-jar</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>me.kpavlov.aimocks</groupId>
            <artifactId>ai-mocks-gemini-jvm</artifactId>
            <version>${ai-mocks.version}</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

    </dependencies>

</project>

content.text: I found the vulnerable builder and the analogous Vertex AI handling. I’ll add temporary regression tests that reproduce both null and empty candidate cases before applying the fix.

content.content: M langchain4j-google-ai-gemini/src/main/java/dev/langchain4j/model/googleai/GeminiStreamingResponseBuilder.java

content.text:
Implemented the fix in:

- `langchain4j-google-ai-gemini/src/main/java/dev/langchain4j/model/googleai/GeminiStreamingResponseBuilder.java`

Change made:
- `append()` now safely checks `partialResponse.candidates()` before accessing index `0`.
- If candidates are `null`, empty, or the first candidate is `null`, it returns an empty `TextAndTools` result instead of throwing `NullPointerException` or `IndexOutOfBoundsException`.

Validation performed:
- Added temporary regression tests for:
  - `candidates == null`
  - `candidates.isEmpty()`
- Confirmed both tests failed before the fix with the expected NPE/IOOBE.
- Applied the fix.
- Confirmed both tests passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary regression tests as requested.
- Ran final compile:

```bash
./mvnw -pl langchain4j-google-ai-gemini -DskipTests compile
```

Result: `BUILD SUCCESS`

No commits were created.
